query:
UPDATE platform_config 
SET configValue = '+18556074585',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE configKey = 'TWILIO_LIVE_FROM_NUMBER';

UPDATE platform_config 
SET configValue = '+18556074585',
    description = 'Active Twilio From Phone Number (currently: live credentials)',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE configKey = 'TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER';
